title: Convert compass descriptions to standard angles
text: N of W → 90°+angle from north toward west. "S of E" → negative angle below east. "S of W" → 180°+angle. "Due $$east"=0\degree$$. "E of N" → 90°-angle from east. Examples: 45° N of $$W=135\degree;$$ 60° S of $$E=-60\degree;$$ 25° S of $$W=205\degree;$$ 5° E of $$N=85\degree;$$ 55° S of $$W=235\degree$$.
